violations.text: The three bay sink located in the kitchen area was not in good repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/14/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the kitchen and exit way 2 broken refrigerator/freezers, one freezer. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 11/14/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Paper towels were added to hand-washing sink at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2025
The dishwasher, and 2 door freezer was observed in poor repair. Establishment is using 3-bay sink to wash, rinse, and sanitize. Equipment must be in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/13/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the dry storage shelves have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2025

The floor under the refrigeration unit has an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the dry storage shelves have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 10/04/2024
The floor tiles under the dishwasher were observed in poor repair. Physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 06/08/2024

There is no gap between the prep sink, and the drain. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 02/15/2024

Cooked mixed veggies was observed held at 130 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Oven was turned to a hotter temperature. Food was reheated to over 165, food was out of temp for a short period of time. Establishment is to turn oven on before delivery is made, and hold food in oven with oven turned on and keep food above 135. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the wall under the dish machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2023
The floor by the service sink is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the prep sink pipes, and inside the cabinets have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/27/2023

The walls by the dishwasher has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/27/2023
